title: Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator in a country where PayPal is blocked, or you're tired of Gumroad's fees, and you can't sell ebooks, courses, or design assets without breaking the bank. You've tried Payhip, Stripe, and other solutions, but they either don't work or come with annoying restrictions. You need a way to sell digital products online without the hassle of conventional payment platforms. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, with a solution that lets you sell design assets with crypto payments, without the need for PayPal.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling design assets with crypto payments isn't just a novelty; it's a lifeline for creators stuck in regions with restrictive payment systems. It's a chance to monetize your ebooks, courses, templates, and fonts without breaking the bank on fees. With Unchained Commerce, you can tap into a global market, reach customers worldwide, and get paid in the currency of your choice.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The magic happens with Core Shop Engine, a full backend solution that handles automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account is required, and it works everywhere, making it the perfect alternative to PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad. When a customer buys a design asset, the Core Shop Engine bot engine kicks in, ensuring a seamless transaction and instant delivery.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The product types that work best with crypto-native delivery are any digital files that can be stored on a server and delivered via download link: ebooks in PDF or EPUB format, courses as video files or structured content packages, Notion templates as exported .notion files or share links, fonts as ZIP archives of OTF and TTF files, preset packs for Lightroom, Capture One, or DaVinci Resolve, beat files as WAV or MP3 archives, plugin installers, stock photo packs, and any other file-based product. The Core Shop Engine handles the delivery link generation and expiry, ensuring that download links are valid for a set time period and cannot be shared indefinitely after a single purchase.
Selling design assets with crypto payments is a game-changer for creators in restricted regions.
The Components That Make It Work Together

At the heart of Unchained Commerce is the Core Shop Engine, a robust backend solution that integrates with Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR codes. Together, they provide a seamless experience for customers and creators alike. Admin Dashboard and Full Stack Bundle are also part of the package, offering real-time analytics, transaction logs, and priority updates.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Scaling a crypto-native digital store does not require changing infrastructure at any particular revenue level. The Core Shop Engine handles payment verification and delivery through the same webhook pipeline whether you are processing five orders a month or five hundred. GitHub Pages scales to any traffic level automatically. NOWPayments handles volume without per-transaction approval delays. The only constraint as you scale is marketing — the technical infrastructure is the same on day one as it is at significant revenue. This is a meaningful advantage over platform-based alternatives where payout policies, fee structures, and compliance requirements often change as your volume increases.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
With Core Shop Engine, you can sell digital products online without the hassle of conventional payment platforms.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking to sell ebooks, courses, or design assets without the hassle of conventional payment platforms, you're not alone. Digital creators worldwide are turning to Unchained Commerce to sell their products online with crypto payments. Check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see how it works. With Core Shop Engine, you can tap into a global market and get paid in the currency of your choice.
Your Action Checklist

Prepare your product files in delivery-ready format — PDF for ebooks, ZIP archives for multi-file products like font families or preset packs. Set your prices in USD and use NOWPayments to handle the crypto equivalent calculation automatically. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your product list with file paths, prices, and delivery settings. Set up Web3 Wallet Connect with your product display and checkout configuration. Test the checkout flow in a browser on both desktop and mobile — confirm the QR code generates correctly and the payment amount displays accurately. Complete a real mainnet test transaction and confirm the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and verify the test transaction appears with correct details. Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
Unchained Commerce offers a robust solution for digital creators who want to monetize their ebooks, courses, and design assets with crypto payments.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
